notes: Unity engine game. Runs perfectly fine.
title: And All Would Cry Beware!

notes:
Runs flawlessly except for the following two (very minor) issues:

The game doesn't seem to properly respect the volume set in my volume mixer (using pulseaudio), but the volume can be set in game as well, so this is not an issue.

Additionally, sometimes hitting esc to back out of a menu didn't work, but the game has on-screen buttons to back out of menus, so this is not an issue either.
title: And All Would Cry Beware!
